title: Meenkulathi Temple
tagline: Meenkulathi Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: The Meenkulathi Temple is located in Pallassena, a village in southern India.
overview.description: The Meenkulathi Temple is located in Pallassena, a village in southern India.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pallassena
topPlaces.description: Pallassana is a village and gram panchayat in the Palakkad District, state of Kerala, India. It is close to Kollengode Town and Koduvayur and beside the river Gayatri, one of the tributaries of Bharatapuza.

topPlaces.name: Kakkayur
topPlaces.description: Kakkayur is a small village between Koduvayur, Pallavur and Kunisseri in Palakkad district of Kerala state, south India. Kakkayur is on the Palakkad Nemmara route about 13 km from Palakkad town.

topPlaces.name: Koduvayur
topPlaces.description: Koduvayur is a Census Town and Grama Panchayat in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India. Koduvayur Panchayat comprises Koduvayur-I and Koduvayur-II villages.

topPlaces.name: Elavancherry
topPlaces.description: Elavanchery is a village and gram panchayat near Kollengode Town in Palakkad district, Kerala, India. It is situated on the foothills of Nelliyampathy mountain ranges, a part of the Western Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Vadavannur
topPlaces.description: Vadavannur is a village and grama panchayat near to Kollengode Town in the Palakkad District of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Pallavur
topPlaces.description: Pallavur is a village situated in the Chittur Taluk, Palakkad district of Kerala, India. It is close to Kollengode Town, Nemmara and Koduvayur.

topPlaces.name: Ethanur
topPlaces.description: Ethanur is a village which is situated in Kerala at southern side of Palakkad district (12 km).

topPlaces.name: Oottara
topPlaces.description: Oottara is a small locality in Vadavannur Panchayat near Kollengode Town in Palakkad District of Kerala State in India. The Kollengode Railway station is located at Oottara.

items.note: Pallassana is a village and gram panchayat in the Palakkad District, state of Kerala, India. It is close to Kollengode Town and Koduvayur and beside the river Gayatri, one of the tributaries of Bharatapuza.
Kakkayur is a small village between Koduvayur, Pallavur and Kunisseri in Palakkad district of Kerala state, south India. Kakkayur is on the Palakkad Nemmara route about 13 km from Palakkad town.
Koduvayur is a Census Town and Grama Panchayat in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India. Koduvayur Panchayat comprises Koduvayur-I and Koduvayur-II villages.
Elavanchery is a village and gram panchayat near Kollengode Town in Palakkad district, Kerala, India. It is situated on the foothills of Nelliyampathy mountain ranges, a part of the Western Ghats.
Vadavannur is a village and grama panchayat near to Kollengode Town in the Palakkad District of Kerala, India.
Pallavur is a village situated in the Chittur Taluk, Palakkad district of Kerala, India. It is close to Kollengode Town, Nemmara and Koduvayur.
Ethanur is a village which is situated in Kerala at southern side of Palakkad district (12 km).
Oottara is a small locality in Vadavannur Panchayat near Kollengode Town in Palakkad District of Kerala State in India. The Kollengode Railway station is located at Oottara.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Meenkulathi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Meenkulathi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Meenkulathi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (61 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (53 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Meenkulathi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Meenkulathi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Meenkulathi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Meenkulathi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Meenkulathi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pallassena, Kakkayur, Koduvayur, Elavancherry, Vadavannur.
